title: 'Who Approved?' AAP's Sanjay Singh Seeks Clarification Over BJP Tag For Raghav Chadha, 6 Others In Rajya Sabha Record
description: AAP MP Sanjay Singh sought urgent clarification over alleged “unauthorised” changes made to the party’s position in official parliamentary records. In his letter, Singh highlighted that the changes were carried out “unilaterally” without the concurrence of the party or its floor leader in the House.
